description_long: This is a tall, narrow shelving unit constructed primarily from wood, featuring three open horizontal shelves supported by two vertical side frames. The design is minimalist, with clean lines and no visible hardware or decorative elements. The shelves are evenly spaced, providing ample storage or display space for items such as books, plants, or urban accessories. The open back and sides allow for visibility and access from multiple angles, making it suitable for placement against a wall or as a freestanding divider. The wood has a natural finish, giving it a warm, neutral appearance that blends well with various urban environments. There are no doors, handles, or glass panels present, emphasizing its open and accessible structure.
description: A tall, narrow wooden shelving unit with three open shelves and a minimalist, open-frame design. The natural wood finish and lack of doors or handles give it a clean, accessible look.
description_view_0: Front view showing three open shelves framed by two vertical wooden supports.
description_view_1: Side view revealing the depth of the shelves and the open, backless structure.
description_view_2: Rear view, similar to the front, displaying the open shelves and vertical supports.
description_view_3: Opposite side view, again highlighting the shelf depth and open frame.
